_comment: Romanian audio config. Uses a NATIVE Romanian voice + Turbo v2.5, which ENFORCES language_code so words spelled like English are still spoken in Romanian. (multilingual_v2 only auto-detects and cannot be forced — that was the bug.) eleven_flash_v2_5 is functionally identical and also valid. See scripts/list-voices.mjs to discover/verify Romanian voices in your account.

_recommended_voices._note: If you want to audition alternatives, run: node scripts/audition-voices.mjs ro
